title: Integration test conditionally skips when real data is absent
evidence: integration_test.go:15-17 t.Skip("real dataset not present"); data/kaggle/*.csv ARE present in this archive so the test actually runs here
suggestion: Acceptable guard; the unit suites cover the same logic on testdata. No action needed unless deterministic CI coverage of the headline 2019 result is required.

title: Extended match stats loaded but not exposed as a query
evidence: loader.go:470-476 parses home/away shots, corners, attacks into Match; no MCP tool surfaces them (tools.go catalog has no shots/corners tool)
suggestion: Optional: expose extended stats via match_statistics or a dedicated tool. Beyond TASK.md spec; not a deduction.
